---
title: "Evaluation"
description: "Fitting, simulation, and model comparison"
---

This section covers how to evaluate models against data.

## Overview

Model evaluation in jaxcmr involves three interconnected processes:

1. **Simulation** - Generate predictions from a model
2. **Fitting** - Find parameters that best explain observed data
3. **Comparison** - Compare models to determine which best accounts for the data

## Sections

- [Fitting](fitting.qmd) - Parameter optimization with differential evolution
- [Simulation](simulation.qmd) - Generating model predictions
- [Comparison](comparison.qmd) - Formal model comparison
